subject: Empty star files and _corr volumes after template matching
body:
Hi all, 

I repeatedly got empty star files without any particle coordinates and all 
black _corr volumes after running the template matching step in WARP.  

So far tried the template matching on both deconv and regular tomos, also 
changed through a few different reference maps. Without any crashing or 
error  in WARP, all attempts resulted blank star files and empty _corr 
volume. 

For sanity check, I took the tomos reconstructed in WARP and the same 
reference map as inputs to run template matching in other package and got 
cross correlation peaks and coordinates list just fine. 

Has anyone encountered similar issue? Much appreciated if anyone can give 
advice on where to start troubleshooting for template matching in WARP. 

Kind regards,
Wen
